title: Is anyone using Monday.com for P3.express Projects?
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I’d love to get your comments / thoughts on how I can use Monday.com to carry out my projects.  I am looking to use P3.Express project methodology. 
Many thanks!

posts.author: bcpallister (Bradley Pallister)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: iamjameshannam (James)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im looking at this too, don’t suppose you’ve found anything else out?

Im toying with the idea of knowing up a few test boards to see if I can automate a few of the processes / steps.

Would be great to chat!
